The '''Rian-327 airspeeder''', sometimes referred to as a '''classic speeder''', was an aerodynamic, classic-style [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]] that saw use during the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] on worlds such as [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==History==
[[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] owned a Rian-327 airspeeder when she served as [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The silver-and-red speeder featured [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor field]] seats, a rear anti-[[Homing beacon/Legends|tracking device]] and a secret compartment ideal for hiding a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]]. The speeder's engine was modified by her husband, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]].

Senator Amidala's personal airspeeder was often piloted by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gregar Typho/Legends|Typho]]. It happened when he brought the Senator, along with [[Ellé/Legends|Ellé]] and [[Moteé/Legends|Moteé]], to his apartment on Coruscant, to the special landing platform where the [[J-type star skiff|Naboo Skiff]] docked for his fateful journey to [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] after the formation of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
